examples: In a little while he changes into a real Donkey and begins to bray.
Th' world's full o' jackasses brayin' an' they never bray nowt but lies.
I will be the Vicar of Bray, Sir!
After Jeremy Bray's stumps were splattered, solitary slip Yusuf Pathan collected two excellent catches.
Instead, it quotes a prominent Muslim activist, former SDSer Mahdi Bray, supporting the rally.
